text:
Program. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: OTC_UM_PROGRAM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not Applicable 

X = Unknown 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2008. 
Plans that elect to cover OTC drugs as part of general drug utilization management or part of a step 
therapy protocol have identified the applicable drugs and they appear in the OTC Drug file (which is 
delivered as part of the Formulary File, starting in 2010). 
When OTC_UM_PROGRAM=”Y”
